title: These People Have Problems | Goodbye, Uchimaki-kun
overview: Uzumaki Subaru joins the Art Club with Usami Mizuki. Mizuki has a crush on Subaru, but he's only interested in 2D girls.

title: Case of the Lost Child's Love Letter Murder
overview: The President is dead, but not from bleeding to death, as it first appears. He's dead because the puddle of "blood" he's in is actually red paint that he'd gotten on Mizuki's painting.

title: Looking for a Bob Kiss
overview: Colette can't find her rocket -- err, locket. Subaru's new waifu could end up being a bald guy named Bob. Mizuki's friends can't stop teasing her about Subaru, so they follow her to the art club room.

title: Welcome to a Little Walk
overview: Tachibana-sensei is the new, fearful advisory teacher for the Art Club. Colette goes for a walk, putting herself at risk of being melted by the day star. Subaru offers to bring Mizuki's print-outs to her.

title: Dove Train
overview: Colette gives a plaster head a tan, setting in motion a chain of unlikely misunderstandings. Colette becomes a bird.

title: The Curious Cute Transfer Girl
overview: Subaru has a new classmate. Even though she's super pretty, Mizuki isn't too concerned, because he isn't interested in 3D girls. But this one girl knows what to say to get his attention.

title: First Imari
overview: Uchimaki and Usami enter the art competition, encouraged by Yumeko-sensei and a new rival. Colette plans for her future, but Usami doesn't take her seriously.

title: Secret Treasure Hunt!
overview: Subaru and Mizuki get themselves locked inside a storage room. Help was on its way, but it was Yumeko-sensei. Subaru and Maria discover directions to a treasure left by previous members of the Art Club.

title: The Grimoire Stroll Returns
overview: Subaru and the president are on a mission to preserve their dangerous book. Subaru's challenger returns for a rematch. The president takes Moeka on a tour around school.

title: Nostalgic Kaori Cram School
overview: This time, we'll look back to see what happened after Usami and Uchimaki helped the missing girl, who turned out to be Moeka, her teacher's granddaughter. But although they are treated as model students, the consequences are not all good and Usami finds himself in a hurry to reject the candidacy for the Student Council.

title: Unity! Empty Cans! Cultural Festival!
overview: The date of the cultural festival is approaching, but the Literature Club is not among its participants. When the club's advisor learned about this, she decided to take the reins and involve the club in the activities of the cultural festival.

title: From Now On
overview: It's raining hard, and Maria is without an umbrella. Mizuki suggests Subaru offer her his, setting off a logistical and romantic conundrum.
